creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
/usr/local/share/terminfo.db previously backed up to /usr/local/share/terminfo.db.default

The script /usr/ports/Keywords/terminfo.ucl (run in this case by x11/kitty install) nuked my terminfo when run.

It blindly copies terminfo.db.default to terminfo.db before running tic on new files.
